target: 5. Warning
July 23

If we've come this far,
we're almost at Kofune.
Um… how far are you planning to follow me?
S-sorry, I can't leave you alone, you know?
(Even if you spread the smell of alcohol…)
Huh? What's wrong?
(Well, whatever.)

Totsumura-san, since it's such a rare opportunity,
let's discuss what's going to happen next.
Next…?

Tomorrow, the investigating officers are coming, right?
How are you planning to explain this to the people from the mainland?
Ah, that's a problem…
That…

No way, I can't remember.
What did I report exactly?
I remember saying some things, but…

Well, either way, it's a fact that this island is in danger,
so we have no choice but to get the mainland police to investigate.

You're right.
Yeah, that's the way it is!

(Still… I don't want to show the footage of the stolen Mio—
the Shadow Mio—to the mainland police.)

(When I showed it to Totsumura-san,
he initially thought it was a joke.)
(If I'm not careful, it'll just drag Mio into more trouble.)
Then there's the festival to worry about.

The festival…?
Ah, the Hitogashima Summer Festival tomorrow?

On the festival day, tourists from the mainland will flood the island.
If something happens during that chaos…

Huh… I've already taken precautions
with the neighborhood chiefs and responsible people.
You, Totsumura-san…?

After hearing about the Shadow from you,
I went around to the neighborhood chiefs and responsible people
during the day to issue a warning.

If you spot any strange people,
don't go out unnecessarily.

Even if I say that, they're all looking forward to the festival.
I don't know how much I can protect them,
but at least raising their awareness will help.
What's with that face?
Huh? No, it's nothing…!
(Who knew Totsumura-san would actually do his job this well…)
Ah… maybe that's why you were late coming to the harbor today…

Ah, the warning call I made earlier
took longer than expected.

It was quite a hassle,
but I couldn't let anything slip through.

I'm the Hero of Justice here,
and it's my job to protect everyone on this island!
Totsumura-san…
"He really does seem like a Hero of Justice."
"I might have misunderstood Totsumura-san."

For some reason, Totsumura-san right now
really does seem like a Hero of Justice.

Huh!?
What do you mean "really"?
Well, you're usually like that.

That's rude.
I won't deny it, though.

I might have misunderstood Totsumura-san.
He's actually pretty reliable, huh?

"Unexpectedly"…
What kind of image did you have of me, Shinpei?
You're hurting my feelings.
(To be honest, I don't know how much I can rely on this person…)
(At least, they believe what I'm saying.)

(That alone makes me happy…
and gives me some confidence.)
What was that light?

Mio?
Why are you here…?
Totsumura-san, don't get close!
What's with that face?
Maybe this isn't Mio…

What are you talking about?
She looks exactly like Mio.
Stop being so careless and sober up!

After going to Tokiko's place,
changing into my uniform and going ahead…
That's impossible, right?
You're right, something's off.

Huh, wait a second.
So, this Mio…?
It was Mio with a knife in front of my house.
T-this one…!?
